label: 第135話
source_locator: 単行本16巻 目次 p.27
summary_short: 脹相は虎杖を弟として守り、術師たちは夏油の肉体を操る術師と裏梅へ一斉に挑む。裏梅の氷凝呪法で窮地に陥ったところへ九十九由基が現れる。
summary_full: 脹相は血のつながりから虎杖を弟と確信し、兄として守るため羂索と裏梅へ挑む。百斂から放つ穿血で裏梅の手を傷つけ、羂索とも接近戦を行う。パンダ、加茂、西宮らも加勢するが、裏梅は氷凝呪法の霜凪で術師たちを凍結し、反転術式で手を治す。脹相は赤鱗躍動で氷を溶かし、虎杖と西宮も抵抗するものの、直瀑による追撃を受ける。氷の攻撃を凰輪が破壊し、九十九由基が戦場へ現れる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Convinced 虎杖悠仁 is his younger brother, 脹相 fights with all his might to protect him. Viewing 脹相's disruption as an opportunity to be taken advantage of, the jujutsu sorcerers launch one last assault to retake 獄門疆 from Pseudo-夏油 . When they're all literally frozen in their tracks by 裏梅 , someone from 夏油傑 's past arrives on the battlefield to make the save.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: " Using all my strength, I will fulfill my duty as the older brother!! " A side effect of 脹相's 術式 is that he can sense the transformation of his younger brothers through their blood connection. Death is the last and greatest transformation any living thing can achieve. Just before finishing off 悠仁 in their fight earlier in 渋谷, 脹相 could feel the sensation of his death. To 脹相, this can only mean that 悠仁 is also his younger brother. Pseudo-加茂憲紀 has extended his life from moving from host to host, making it possible that 悠仁 and 脹相 could share some sort of blood relation. In order to fulfill his duty as an older brother, 脹相 is ready to protect 悠仁 with all his strength. 脹相 activates 赤血操術 : 百斂 , surprising Kyoto High's 加茂憲紀 with how much superior it is to his own. The 呪術高専 students attempt to take advantage of 脹相's disruption. 脹相 fires 穿血 and it almost reaches 裏梅's face in the blink of an eye. 裏梅 is surprised by the immense speed of 穿血 and barely manages to protect their face. 夏油 sidesteps the attack while it drills a hole through one of his partner's 呪力 reinforced hands. 脹相 swings the stream of blood following the blood arrow to slash at 夏油. This breaks up the ground and 脹相 uses the blood he placed there to disrupt 夏油's footing. They engage each other by trading blows in close quarters combat. 夏油 is the first to land a significant strike and suggests 脹相 shouldn't strain himself after fighting so much earlier. 脹相 doesn't believe being tired as any excuse for putting his life on the line to protect his younger brother. Confused, パンダ asks if 悠仁 is really related too 脹相. 悠仁 doesn't believe they are and reveals how 脹相 nearly killed him earlier. Regardless of his relationship with 悠仁, Noritoshi points out that 脹相 is creating a disturbance that they need to take advantage of. With two cores still going strong, パンダ goes out front in ゴリラモード while they others follow behind him. パンダ activates his Unblockable Drumming Beat , but suddenly 裏梅 activates their innate technique : 氷凝呪法 . 裏梅 freezes the jujutsu sorcerers. 裏梅 uses 霜凪 to release an icy mist that freezes 脹相, Noritoshi, パンダ, and 日下部 . 夏油 asks them not to kill the sorcerers because he needs messengers. 裏梅 heals their hand using a 反転術式 , discouraging 日下部 who considers these curse users to be on a whole other level. 脹相 activates 赤鱗躍動 to rapidly increase his body's temperature and melt the ice, claiming it can't hold him. 裏梅 appears in front of 脹相 with a frozen tipped finger pointing at his face and asks how much ice it will take then. 悠仁, one of the only ones who wasn't frozen, drop kicks 脹相 out of the ice to save him from 裏梅. Annoyed, 裏梅 asks who does the vessel think that body belongs to. 悠仁 believes he wasn't frozen due to 宿儺 and asks 脹相 who's side he's on. 脹相 denies he's fighting with the sorcerers and states once again that he's 悠仁's older brother. He even asks 悠仁 to try calling him "big brother" just once. 悠仁 ignores this because he notices 西宮桃 flying down towards the ground on her broom. 裏梅 threatens to finish 脹相 off. 桃 uses her Wind Scythe technique to launch a blade of 呪力 wind from her broom at the two curse users. 裏梅 is able to block this attack with their bare hands much easier than 穿血, frustrating 桃. With 悠仁, 桃, and 脹相 the only ones still mobile, the Kyoto student tells the other two they need to buy time for 歌姫 . " What kind of girls are you into? " Dissatisfied with needing a messenger as a reason for keeping this many enemy sorcerers alive, 裏梅 actives 氷凝呪法 again. They claim 悠仁 alone will be enough and creates a stream of icicles that surrounds both curse users before splitting apart to freeze their adversaries. The flying ice bits attack and freeze 悠仁, 脹相, and 桃 in place. A second wave sharpened icicles attack them from above, ensuring certain death. Their demise seems assured until a mysterious 式神 suddenly appears to quickly break apart the ice. The special grade sorcerer 九十九由基 appears on the battlefield to accompany her 式神. She asks 夏油 the same question again from all those years ago: inquiring as to what kind of girl's he's into.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 壊相 (想像) 血塗 (想像) 虎杖悠仁 脹相 裏梅 Pseudo-夏油 加茂憲紀 パンダ 西宮桃 日下部篤也 九十九由基

key_events_verified_phase7: 脹相が虎杖を弟として守ると宣言する
脹相の穿血が裏梅の手を傷つける
術師たちが羂索と裏梅へ一斉攻撃する
裏梅が氷凝呪法で術師たちを凍らせる
九十九由基と凰輪が介入する
verification_notes_phase7: 集英社公式14～16巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第七段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
